title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.840 - Nonseverability clause
text:
190.840.  Nonseverability clause. — Notwithstanding the provisions of section 1.140 to the contrary, the provisions of this act* shall be nonseverable, and if any provision is for any reason held to be invalid, such decision shall invalidate all of the remaining provisions of this act*.
(L. 2011 S.B. 62 § 1) 
*"This act" contained numerous sections.  Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
